mapper.sql: SELECT ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, CAR_NUM, SHIP_NAME, PORT_CODE, CARGO_NAME, PLAN_TON, CARGO_OWNER, IN_PORT_DATE, IN_PORT_TIME FROM S_INPORT_CAR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO S_INPORT_CAR(ID, CAR_NUM, SHIP_NAME, PORT_CODE, CARGO_NAME, PLAN_TON, CARGO_OWNER, IN_PORT_DATE, IN_PORT_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{carNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{portCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planTon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoOwner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inPortDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inPortTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE S_INPORT_CAR
ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CAR_NUM = #{carNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_NAME = #{shipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PORT_CODE = #{portCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PLAN_TON = #{planTon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_OWNER = #{cargoOwner,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IN_PORT_DATE = #{inPortDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IN_PORT_TIME = #{inPortTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

begin
UPDATE S_INPORT_CAR SET
ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CAR_NUM = #{carNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_NAME = #{shipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PORT_CODE = #{portCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PLAN_TON = #{planTon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_OWNER = #{cargoOwner,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IN_PORT_DATE = #{inPortDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IN_PORT_TIME = #{inPortTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id};
end;
